# DyGarn Solutions

> AI automation and consulting for small and medium-sized businesses in Atlantic Canada.

## About
DyGarn Solutions is an AI consulting and automation agency based in Nova Scotia, Canada, founded by Greg Drysdale. Greg has 27+ years of experience in technical sales across Atlantic Canada and specializes in helping SMBs (5-50 employees) adopt AI to reduce manual work, cut costs, and grow revenue. Every project is hands-on — clients work directly with Greg, not a team of account managers.

## Services
- AI Workflow Automation: Mapping and rebuilding business processes with intelligent automation ($2,000-$7,500 setup)
- Custom AI Chatbots: Conversational agents trained on client data for support, sales, or internal knowledge
- Data Intelligence: AI-powered analytics, dashboards, and real-time KPIs from existing business data
- AI Strategy Consulting: Business audit and implementation roadmap for AI adoption
- System Integration: Connecting CRMs, ERPs, APIs, and databases into AI-enhanced ecosystems
- Invoice and Document Automation: AI reads invoices, flags discrepancies, reconciles payments

## Process
1. Discovery — Deep-dive into business goals, pain points, and current tools
2. Strategy — Custom AI roadmap with model and tool selection
3. Build — Development, testing, and refinement with transparent progress
4. Launch & Scale — Live deployment with monitoring and optimization

## Target Audience
Small and medium-sized businesses (5-50 employees) in trades, construction, electrical distribution, manufacturing, professional services, and healthcare — primarily in Atlantic Canada (Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, Prince Edward Island).

## Pricing
- Setup: $2,000 - $7,500 CAD (one-time)
- Monthly support: $1,000 - $2,500 CAD (ongoing optimization)
- Free 45-minute AI Audit available — no pitch, no commitment

## Industries Served
Construction, electrical trades, manufacturers' representatives, distribution, professional services, healthcare, real estate
